---
title: "UKB chr1 Dense Store — Array Query API Benchmark"
subtitle: "chr1 × 100 UKB analyses · sparse flat array return contract"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
---

## Dataset

| Field | Value |
|---|---:|
| Variants (hg38) | 762,080 |
| Analyses | 100 |
| Store size | 309.4 MB |
| Build time | 547.2s |
| Liftover failures | 0 |
| Store path | `/home/gh13047/repo/opengwasdb/docs/benchmark-output/vcf_ukb_chr1_dense.opengwasdb` |

## Query API

All five query methods return `dict[str, np.ndarray]` with four parallel sparse
flat arrays (`variant_index`, `analysis_index`, `z`, `se`), matching the format
of the internal top-hit index. `AssociationResult` Python object materialisation
is completely eliminated.

## Timings

Each pattern ran 10 repetitions after one warm-up call.
Row API column shows the previous `AssociationResult` baseline for comparison.
besdq column is the besdq zarr `zstd_bitshuffle` baseline.

| Query | Median ms | p95 ms | Result count | Row API ms | Speedup | besdq ms | vs besdq |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| regional | 29.1 | 34.2 | 324,048 | n/a | n/a | 4.988 | 5.8× ⚠ |
| phewas | 1.9 | 2.2 | 100 | n/a | n/a | 0.906 | 2.1× ⚠ |
| tophits | 1.4 | 1.6 | 14,557 | n/a | n/a | 0.688 | 2.0× |
| bulk | 816.3 | 898.6 | 762,080 | n/a | n/a | 490.517 | 1.7× |
| random_lookup | 120.0 | 173.2 | 598 | n/a | n/a | 30.424 | 3.9× ⚠ |

## Interpretation

- WARNING: 5.8× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.
- WARNING: 2.1× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.
- WARNING: 3.9× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.

## Provenance

- JSON results: `opengwasdb_vcf_ukb_chr1_benchmark.json`
- Row-API baseline: `n/a`
- besdq baseline: `ukb-chr1_zarr_benchmark.json`
